root_cause_analysis.broken_thumbnails: r2.dev URLs are expired presigned R2 URLs. The R2 bucket is configured for private access, so presigned URLs expire.
root_cause_analysis.missing_r2_keys: The r2_thumb_key field was not populated when derivatives were generated for many records. Need to extract from thumb_url or regenerate.

recommended_actions.action: Rebuild derivatives for 1126 photos with r2.dev URLs
recommended_actions.reason: Presigned URLs have expired, images not accessible publicly

recommended_actions.action: Populate missing r2_thumb_key from thumb_url where possible
recommended_actions.reason: Cannot regenerate derivatives without R2 keys
Same R2 object indexed under multiple photo records

recommended_actions.action: Galleries already have covers - no action needed
